chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-131 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 30.04.2025 Applicant present in person. Complainant present in person. Mr. Siraj Ahmed Bijarani Assistant PG Inspector Asghar Ali Sathio IO PS Nindo and ASI Natho Khan PS Nindo -.-.-. This Criminal Miscellaneous Application is filed against the Order passed by the learned Trial Court u/s 22-A & B Cr.P.C. It has been informed that the case has already been challaned and the matter cannot be further reinvestigated and the Trial Court where the criminal case is pending is approached. Although this matter pending before the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace was perhaps still pending however now this case for further reinvestigation cannot be held unless approached by the Complainant to the Trial Court. In such circumstances, Criminal Miscellaneous Application u/s 561-A Cr.P.C. is dismissed. However, the learned Trial Court is directed to entertain the grievance of the present Applicant if and when approached J U D G E Ali Haider
